faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Union typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Union?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Union can be completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatments, or may require 2-3 visits over several weeks for chemical treatments. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and provide a detailed timeline during the initial inspection.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Union?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatment methods are EPA-approved and safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. For heat treatments, there are no chemicals involved. For chemical treatments, we use low-toxicity products and provide clear instructions for re-entry times.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and offer same-day or next-day service throughout Union, New Jersey. Contact us before noon and we'll do our best to schedule your inspection or treatment the same day.
